headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From McKesson’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: McKesson’s first quarter results fell short of analyst revenue expectations, with management attributing the shortfall to lower branded pharmaceutical revenues, including manufacturer price declines and a sequential dip in GLP-1 medication volumes. Despite these headwinds, sales grew year over year, supported by strength in specialty pharmaceutical distribution and expanded provider networks in oncology and multispecialty.
